title: Tax Strategy & 1031 Exchanges
subtitle: Keep more of what you earn — legally
description: CRE's greatest advantage is the tax code. This course covers 1031 like-kind exchanges, cost segregation studies, bonus depreciation, passive activity rules, qualified opportunity zones, and how to structure an exit that defers (or eliminates) capital gains. This is how smart operators compound wealth tax-free for decades.
outcomes: Execute a 1031 exchange with a qualified intermediary and meet all deadlines
Order a cost segregation study and calculate accelerated depreciation
Understand bonus depreciation, Section 179, and the current phase-down
Navigate passive activity loss rules and real estate professional status
Structure an exit using 1031, DST, 721 UPREIT, or installment sale
